emails.subject: Why [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] keeps coming back (the part most doctors miss)
emails.preview: The root cause question your doctor forgot
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

If you have been dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM], you already know the frustration of treatments that only work for a while — or not at all.

Here is something worth knowing: [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] rarely exists in isolation. Most of the time it is the visible signal of a deeper imbalance — whether hormonal, inflammatory, neurological, or metabolic. When care only addresses the surface symptom, relief is temporary at best.

At Rebel Med NW, our practitioners spend real time asking why — not just what. Your [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT] suggests a particular root cause pattern that we see regularly in our clinic, and that responds well to an integrative approach.

This is what separates naturopathic and functional medicine from conventional care: we treat the system, not just the symptom.

[FIRST_NAME], if you are ready to stop managing [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] and start understanding it, we would love to connect.

With care,
The Rebel Med NW Team

emails.subject: Think of your health like a circuit breaker (here is what this means for you)
emails.preview: Why symptoms flare when the system is overloaded
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Imagine a house where one circuit is overloaded. The breaker trips — lights flicker, appliances stop working. You could replace the lightbulb every time it blows, or you could find the circuit that is overloaded and fix the actual problem.

Your body works the same way. [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] is often the flickering light. The overloaded circuit — the actual cause — might be chronic inflammation, an underactive immune system, gut permeability, or a stress hormone imbalance that has been running in the background for years.

Standard care typically addresses the light (the symptom). At Rebel Med NW, we are looking for the circuit.

Based on [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT], our focus for someone like you would likely involve [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS] — an approach designed to address the underlying system, not just the signal.

This is different. And it is worth a conversation.

Warmly,
The Rebel Med NW Team

emails.subject: What changed when we stopped treating the symptom and started treating the system
emails.preview: A patient story that might feel familiar
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

A patient came to us — we will call her Sarah — dealing with persistent fatigue, brain fog, and hormonal disruption that had not responded to conventional treatment for two years. Lab work looked 'normal.' She felt anything but.

After a thorough intake and functional lab review, we identified an underlying inflammatory pattern and nervous system dysregulation that standard panels do not typically catch. We built a protocol around her specific pattern — not a generic 'fatigue program.'

Three months later, she described feeling like herself for the first time in years.

Results vary, and every patient's journey is different. But Sarah's story reflects what we see regularly when care is built around root causes rather than symptom suppression.

Based on [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT], we believe there is a clear path forward for [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] — and we would love to explore it with you.

[BOOKING_LINK]

With care,
The Rebel Med NW Team
